code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant orch_api as Orchestration
    participant auth_frontend as Authentication Frontend
    participant auth_external_api as Authentication External API
    participant auth_internal_api as Authentication Internal API
    participant account_interventions as Account Interventions API    
    orch_api ->> auth_frontend : OAuth 2.0 Authorization request 302 redirect to /authorize
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : Validate request from Orch and create Auth session 
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /start (Infra_IngressController)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Start helps calculate current state
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend : StartResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : State machine works out where to send user based on start response
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /user-exists (Infra_WorkerNode)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: CheckUserExistsResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend: Validates that the user already has an account
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /account-interventions (Infra_RedisCache)
    auth_internal_api ->> account_interventions : Request to account interventions api (Infra_IngressController)
    account_interventions ->> auth_internal_api : Response from Account Interventions containing blocked=true
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Generates audit event for "blocked" Account Intervention
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: AccountInterventions.java object returned containing blocked intervention
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend: Prevents user from performing password reset due to blocked intervention
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /login (Infra_RedisCache)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: LoginResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : Displays Blocked intervention screen

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的OAuth 2.0登录流程时序图，核心是展示当用户被Account Interventions拦截时的完整路径。从Orchestration开始，经过Authentication Frontend，最后落到Blocked干预页面。
明白，这个流程涉及几个内部服务？我看到有Authentication External API和Authentication Internal API，这两个都要画进去吗？
对，两个都要。External API主要处理对外的302重定向，Internal API处理核心的会话状态计算和用户存在性检查。还有Account Interventions API要单独作为一个participant。

好的，我先画出五个participant：Orchestration、Authentication Frontend、Authentication External API、Authentication Internal API、Account Interventions API。第一步是Orchestration到Authentication Frontend的OAuth 2.0 Authorization request，带302重定向到/authorize。
接下来Frontend要自己验证请求并创建Auth session，然后调用Internal API的/start接口。这里注意，/start请求要标注经过Infra_IngressController。
已添加：Frontend自调用验证请求和创建会话，然后发/start请求到Internal API（标注Infra_IngressController）。Internal API内部计算当前状态后，返回StartResponse.java对象给Frontend。
然后Frontend的状态机根据start response决定下一步，发/user-exists请求到Internal API。这个请求走Infra_WorkerNode，返回CheckUserExistsResponse.java。
确认一下：/user-exists之后Frontend要自调用验证用户已有账户，然后才是/account-interventions请求？
没错。/account-interventions请求先到Internal API（走Infra_RedisCache），然后Internal API再转发到Account Interventions API（走Infra_IngressController）。这是关键路径。
已添加：/account-interventions链路，标注了Infra_RedisCache和Infra_IngressController。Account Interventions API返回blocked=true的响应，然后Internal API生成审计事件。
审计事件的描述要准确，是"blocked" Account Intervention的审计事件。然后Internal API返回AccountInterventions.java对象给Frontend，里面包含blocked intervention。
修正：把审计事件描述改为"Generates audit event for 'blocked' Account Intervention"，并确保AccountInterventions.java对象包含blocked intervention。接下来Frontend要阻止密码重置？
对，Frontend自调用：Prevents user from performing password reset due to blocked intervention。然后继续走/login请求到Internal API（Infra_RedisCache），返回LoginResponse.java，最后显示Blocked干预页面。
完成：添加了/login请求链路，标注Infra_RedisCache，返回LoginResponse.java，最后Frontend自调用显示Blocked intervention screen。整个流程从OAuth请求到最终拦截页面都完整了。
很好，这个时序图准确展示了Account Interventions在登录流程中的拦截机制。所有关键节点、Java对象返回、基础设施组件标注都到位了。
